subject: Chemistry
question_text: At 380oC, the half-life period for the first order decomposition of H2O2 is 360 min. Calculate the time required for 75% decomposition at 450oC.

subject: Chemistry
micro_topic: Electrochemical Series Cell And Their Emf
question_text:
An excess of liquid mercury is added to an acidified solution of 1.0 $$\times$$ 10-3 M Fe3+. It is found that 5% of Fe3+ remains at equilibrium at 25oC. Calculate $$E_{Hg_2^{2 + }|\,Hg}^o$$, assuming that only reaction that occurs is
2Hg + 2Fe3+ $$\to$$ $$Hg_2^{2+}$$ + 2Fe2+
(Given $$E_{F{e^{3 + }}|\,F{e^{2 + }}}^o$$ = 0.77 V)

subject: Chemistry
question_text: A 5.0 cm3 solution of H2O2 liberates 0.508 g of iodine from an acidified KI solution. Calculate the strength of H2O2 solution in terms of volume strength at STP.

subject: Chemistry
question_text: Iodine molecule dissociates into atoms after absorbing light of 4500 Å. If one quantum of radiation is absorbed by each molecule, calculate the kinetic energy of iodine atoms. (Bond energy of I2 = 240 kJ mol-1)

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Let $$(h, k)$$ be a fixed point, where $$h > 0,k > 0.$$. A straight line passing through this point cuts the possitive direction of the coordinate axes at the points $$P$$ and $$Q$$. Find the minimum area of the triangle $$OPQ$$, $$O$$ being the origin.

subject: Mathematics
micro_topic: Solution Of Differential Equations By Method Of Separation Variables And Homogeneous
question_text: Let $$y=f(x)$$ be a curve passing through $$(1,1)$$ such that the triangle formed by the coordinate axes and the tangent at any point of the curve lies in the first quadrant and has area $$2.$$ From the differential equation and determine all such possible curves.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Consider a square with vertices at $$(1,1), (-1,1), (-1,-1)$$ and $$(1, -1)$$. Let $$S$$ be the region consisting of all points inside the square which are nearer to the origin than to any edge. Sketch the region $$S$$ and find its area.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Let $${I_m} = \int\limits_0^\pi  {{{1 - \cos mx} \over {1 - \cos x}}} dx.$$ Use mathematical induction to prove that $${I_m} = m\,\pi ,m = 0,1,2,........$$

subject: Mathematics
question_text: The minimum value of the expression $$\sin \,\alpha  + \sin \,\beta \, + \sin \,\gamma ,\,$$  where $$\alpha ,\,\beta ,\,\gamma $$ are real numbers satisfying $$\alpha  + \beta  + \gamma  = \pi $$ is

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Let '$$d$$' be the perpendicular distance from the centre of the ellipse $${{{x^2}} \over {{a^2}}} + {{{y^2}} \over {{b^2}}} = 1$$ to the tangent drawn at a point $$P$$ on the ellipse. If $${F_1}$$ and $${F_2}$$ are the two foci of the ellipse, then show that $${\left( {P{F_1} - P{F_2}} \right)^2} = 4{a^2}\left( {1 - {{{b^2}} \over {{d^2}}}} \right)$$.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Show that the locus of a point that divides a chord of slope $$2$$ of the parabola $${y^2} = 4x$$ internally in the ratio $$1:2$$ is a parabola. Find the vertex of this parabola.

subject: Mathematics
topic: Straight Lines And Pair Of Straight Lines
question_text: The orthocentre of the triangle formed by the lines $$xy=0$$ and $$x+y=1$$ is

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Let $$a,\,b,\,c$$ be real. If $$a{x^2} + bx + c = 0$$ has two real roots $$\alpha $$ and $$\beta ,$$ where $$\alpha  <  - 1$$ and $$\beta  > 1,$$ then show that $$1 + {c \over a} + \left| {{b \over a}} \right| < 0.$$

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Find the smallest positive number $$p$$ for which the equation $$\cos \left( {p\,\sin x} \right) = \sin \left( {p\cos x} \right)$$ has a solution $$x\, \in \,\left[ {0,2\pi } \right]$$.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: If $$\left| {Z - W} \right| \le 1,\left| W \right| \le 1$$, show that $${\left| {Z - W} \right|^2} \le {(\left| Z \right| - \left| W \right|)^2} + {(ArgZ - Arg\,W)^2}$$

subject: Mathematics
question_text: If $$i{z^3} + {z^2} - z + i = 0$$ , then show that $$\left| z \right| = 1$$.
